concept: Drafting Table meets Control Room. High contrast, technical precision, devoid of visual noise, maximizing data and drawing canvas space. Color is purely functional.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Tight gaps for dashboards (gap-4 or gap-6), utilizing all screen real estate. Generous padding inside containers to prevent text collision.
spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Control Room Grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12). Center canvas takes col-span-8, sidebars take col-span-2 or 4.
spacing_and_layout.borders_and_radius: Grid Borders: expose the skeleton. Cardless look. Sharp corners (rounded-none or rounded-sm max) to simulate CAD software.
spacing_and_layout.shadows: Remove generic soft shadows. Use 1px solid borders for separation. If shadow is needed, use crisp, hard shadow (e.g., shadow-[2px_2px_0px_#0A0A0A]).

surfaces_and_micro_themes.sidebar: Solid White with 1px right border (#E4E4E7) or left border depending on side.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.canvas_area: Stone 100 (#F5F5F4) with a dot grid background pattern to simulate blueprint paper.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.vastu_warning_card: 1px solid #DC2626, very light red tint background (bg-red-50), red mono text.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.vastu_excellent_card: 1px solid #059669, light green tint background (bg-green-50), green mono text.

components.buttons: Sharp corners (rounded-none). Primary: bg-primary text-white hover:bg-primary_hover. Outline: border-stone-300 text-stone-800 hover:border-stone-800.
components.inputs: Shadcn standard but override radius to rounded-none. 1px border. Focus state must have a crisp 2px black ring (focus-visible:ring-black).
components.cards: Override Shadcn Card to rounded-none, shadow-none, border-stone-200. Padding p-6.
components.tabs: Override Shadcn Tabs to remove soft background. Use clean bottom border for active state.
components.dialogs: Sharp corners, no overlay blur, just a solid bg-black/50 scrim.
components.tables: Shadcn Table, border-collapse, 1px solid #E4E4E7 for cells. Header text uses mono font.

architect_avatar.description: Avatar for the AI Copilot or user profile

blueprint_bg.description: Abstract blueprint background for auth pages or empty states

render_preview.description: 3D render preview placeholder for the final exported PDF or 3D view tab

key_features_instructions.plot_input_form: Keep it modular and dense. Use a grid format for entering dimensions, floors, and parameters. Use strict field validations. Use pure HTML/Tailwind styling combined with Shadcn logic.
key_features_instructions.2d_floor_plan_canvas: This is the hero section of the dashboard. Implement a custom CSS grid pattern background (e.g., bg-[size:20px_20px] bg-[linear-gradient(to_right,#e5e5e5_1px,transparent_1px),linear-gradient(to_bottom,#e5e5e5_1px,transparent_1px)]). The rooms should be draggable/resizable blocks with solid colors and 1px black borders. Display dimensions explicitly on the lines.
key_features_instructions.vastu_intelligence_engine: Display the Vastu Score prominently using JetBrains Mono (e.g., '85/100'). Use a vertical progress bar. List real-time warnings dynamically below it using high contrast red/green chips.
key_features_instructions.ai_copilot_chat: Docked in a side panel. Input field should resemble a command-line terminal (font-mono). User messages align right, AI aligns left. Include quick action chips (e.g., 'Optimize for Sun').
key_features_instructions.cost_estimation: A simple datatable component showing BOQ (Bill of Quantities) with standard tabular alignment. Right-align numerical amounts.
key_features_instructions.room_editor: When a room block is selected in the canvas, populate the left sidebar with room-specific properties (dimensions, usage, vastu direction) for editing.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Crisp color shifts. No bouncy scale animations. If something is clickable, change its background or border color instantly or with a very short transition (100ms).
motion_and_interactions.draggable_elements: Add a subtle shadow (shadow-md) and 1px solid black border when a room block is actively being dragged.
motion_and_interactions.vastu_alerts: When a severe Vastu violation occurs, subtly flash the warning card background (pulse once, do not repeat infinitely).

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text passes APCA contrast guidelines against the background. Explicitly define hover states.
accessibility_and_testing.test_ids: All interactive elements MUST have `data-testid` attributes (e.g., `data-testid="export-pdf-button"`, `data-testid="ai-chat-input"`).
